TEMPLATE MANAGEMENT

Classroom Quiz 🎓
🔄 3 Rounds ⏱ 15 Minutes ❓ 5 Q / Round
Department Level 🏢
🔄 5 Rounds ⏱ 30 Minutes ❓ 5 Q / Round
College Tournament 🏆
🔄 10 Rounds ⏱ 45 Minutes ❓ 5 Q / Round
Inter-College 🌎
🔄 15 Rounds ⏱ 60 Minutes ❓ 5 Q / Round

ADD QUESTION
UPLOAD QUESTIONS

Format (Pipe Separated):

Question | Option A | Option B | Option C | Option D | CorrectAnswer

Example (Single Correct):

What is the capital of India?|Delhi|Mumbai|Chennai|Kolkata|A

Example (Multiple Correct):

Which are programming languages?|Java|Apple|Python|Car|A,C
📁
Click or drag & drop CSV/TXT
